NSW.name: New South Wales
NSW.methodology: Prioritize: NSW Food Authority (foodauthority.nsw.gov.au), Scores on Doors A-E grades.

portal.name: NSW Food Authority — Scores on Doors

VIC.name: Victoria
VIC.methodology: Prioritize: VicHealth food safety, City of Melbourne restaurant inspections, FoodSmart Victoria.

QLD.name: Queensland
QLD.methodology: Prioritize: Brisbane City Council & Queensland Health restaurant inspection records.

WA.name: Western Australia
WA.methodology: Prioritize: WA Department of Health (health.wa.gov.au) food premises inspection records.

SA.name: South Australia
SA.methodology: Prioritize: SA Health food premises inspection records, City of Adelaide.

ACT.name: Australian Capital Territory
ACT.methodology: Prioritize: ACT Health food premises inspection records.

TAS.name: Tasmania
TAS.methodology: Prioritize: Tasmania Health Service food premises inspection records.

JP.name: Japan
JP.methodology: Search: Local 保健所 (health centers) food hygiene (食品衛生) inspection records. Score is Pass/Fail from 食品衛生責任者.

Tokyo.methodology: Search: Tokyo Metropolitan Government (東京都) food hygiene (食品衛生) from local 保健所 (health centers). Score is Pass/Fail from 食品衛生責任者.

Osaka.methodology: Search: Osaka Prefecture food hygiene inspection records from 保健所 (hokenjo). Focus on 食品衛生 compliance.

Kyoto.methodology: Search: Kyoto City food safety inspection records from local 保健所.

Kanagawa.methodology: Search: Yokohama City food hygiene inspection records from local 保健所.

Hokkaido.methodology: Search: Sapporo City food safety inspection records from local 保健所.

Fukuoka.methodology: Search: Fukuoka City food hygiene inspection records from local 保健所.

Aichi.methodology: Search: Nagoya City food safety inspection records from 保健所.

KR.name: South Korea
KR.methodology: Search: 식품안전나라 (foodsafetykorea.go.kr) and local metropolitan government food inspection database. Score is 0-100.

Seoul.methodology: Search: 식품안전나라 (foodsafetykorea.go.kr) and Seoul Metropolitan Government food inspection database. Score is 0-100.

Busan.methodology: Search: 식품안전나라 (foodsafetykorea.go.kr) and Busan Metropolitan City food safety records.

Incheon.methodology: Search: 식품안전나라 (foodsafetykorea.go.kr) and Incheon City food hygiene inspection data.

FR.name: France
FR.methodology: Prioritize: Alim'confiance platform (alim-confiance.gouv.fr) — official DGCCRF transparency database with 4-tier ratings.

DE.name: Germany
DE.methodology: Prioritize: verbraucherportal.de and local Lebensmittelüberwachung (food safety authority) inspection records.

Berlin.methodology: Prioritize: verbraucherportal.de and Berlin Senatsverwaltung Lebensmittelüberwachung inspection records.

Bavaria.methodology: Prioritize: LGL Bayern (lgl.bayern.de) food inspection records and verbraucherportal.de.

Hamburg.methodology: Prioritize: Hamburg Lebensmittelüberwachung (hamburg.de/lmue) restaurant inspection records.

North Rhine-Westphalia.methodology: Prioritize: Köln Veterinär- und Lebensmittelüberwachungsamt food inspection records.

Hesse.methodology: Prioritize: Frankfurt am Main food inspection (Lebensmittelüberwachung) records.

NL.name: Netherlands
NL.methodology: Prioritize: NVWA (nvwa.nl) inspection results and inspectieresultaten.nl — Dutch Food and Consumer Product Safety Authority.

DK.name: Denmark
DK.methodology: Prioritize: Smiley scheme (findsmiley.dk) from Fødevarestyrelsen — 4-tier smiley rating for Danish restaurants.

NZ.name: New Zealand
NZ.methodology: Prioritize: local council food premises inspection records and FoodSafe verification scheme.

Auckland.methodology: Prioritize: Auckland Council food premises inspection records and FoodSafe verification scheme.

Wellington.methodology: Prioritize: Wellington City Council environmental health food premises inspections.

Canterbury.methodology: Prioritize: Christchurch City Council food premises inspection records.

BC.name: British Columbia
BC.methodology: Prioritize: Vancouver Coastal Health (vch.ca) restaurant inspection database, Fraser Health inspection records.

portal.name: Vancouver Coastal Health — Restaurant Inspection Reports

AB.name: Alberta
AB.methodology: Prioritize: Alberta Health Services food inspection records.

QC.name: Quebec
QC.methodology: Prioritize: MAPAQ Québec food inspection records and Montreal public health inspection data.

ON.name: Ontario
ON.methodology: Prioritize: Toronto DineSafe inspection reports and local public health unit inspection data.

IN.name: India
IN.methodology: Prioritize: FSSAI (fssai.gov.in) registration database and local municipal corporation food safety records.

Maharashtra.methodology: Prioritize: FSSAI (fssai.gov.in) registration database and Mumbai Municipal Corporation (MCGM) food safety records.

Delhi.methodology: Prioritize: FSSAI (fssai.gov.in) registration and Delhi government food safety inspection records.

Karnataka.methodology: Prioritize: FSSAI (fssai.gov.in) and BBMP (Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike) food safety inspection records.

CN.name: China
CN.methodology: Prioritize: 国家市场监督管理总局 (SAMR) food inspection and local food safety supervision database.

Beijing.methodology: Prioritize: 国家市场监督管理总局 (SAMR) food inspection, Beijing food safety supervision (北京食品安全) database.

Shanghai.methodology: Prioritize: Shanghai municipal food safety authority (上海市食品安全) inspection records.

HK.name: Hong Kong SAR
HK.methodology: Prioritize: FEHD (Food and Environmental Hygiene Department) Hong Kong (fehd.gov.hk) inspection records.

BR.name: Brazil
BR.methodology: Prioritize: local VISA (Vigilância Sanitária) restaurant inspection records.

São Paulo.methodology: Prioritize: VISA São Paulo (cvs.saude.sp.gov.br) Vigilância Sanitária restaurant inspection records.

Rio de Janeiro.methodology: Prioritize: VISA Rio de Janeiro Vigilância Sanitária (rio.rj.gov.br/web/cvs) food establishment inspection records.

Dubai.methodology: Prioritize: Dubai Municipality food safety inspection and grading records.

Abu Dhabi.methodology: Prioritize: ADAFSA (Abu Dhabi Agriculture and Food Safety Authority) restaurant inspection and grading records.

Sharjah.methodology: Prioritize: Sharjah City Municipality food safety inspection records.

SG.name: Singapore
SG.methodology: Prioritize: SFA/NEA food hygiene grades (A/B/C/D/E scale), SFA food establishment inspections (sfa.gov.sg).

IE.name: Ireland
IE.methodology: Prioritize: FSAI (fsai.ie) enforcement orders and closure notices, and local city council food safety inspection records.

GB.name: United Kingdom
GB.methodology: UK Food Standards Agency (FSA) — Food Hygiene Rating Scheme (0-5 scale). Search at ratings.food.gov.uk.
